task_completion.description: Verify the new store is created with the correct name and email address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a store configuration page, store list, or success message showing the store name 'Urban Electronics Europe' and the email 'europe@urbanelectronics.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the store's default currency is set to Euro (EUR).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the store settings or creation form showing the 'Default currency' dropdown or field set to 'Euro' or 'EUR'.

task_completion.description: Verify the store's address is correctly configured for London, UK.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the address fields in the store configuration showing 'United Kingdom' as the country, '10 Oxford Street' as the street address, 'London' as the city/locality, and 'W1D 1BS' as the postal code.

task_completion.description: Verify the store is set as active but NOT as the default store.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the store settings showing the 'Active' checkbox checked, and the 'Default' checkbox UNCHECKED. Alternatively, check the store list to ensure it does not have a 'Default' label next to it.

task_completion.description: Verify the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones are assigned to the new European store while remaining in the US store.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the product edit page for 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' showing both the original US store and 'Urban Electronics Europe' selected in the 'Stores' field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse is assigned to the new European store while remaining in the US store.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the product edit page for 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' showing both the original US store and 'Urban Electronics Europe' selected in the 'Stores' field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web interface to create the store and assign products.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent navigating the e-commerce admin dashboard (e.g., Drupal/Commerce GUI) rather than executing direct database queries or terminal scripts to insert the data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the store creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no open developer tools panels modifying HTML text to display the expected store name or product assignments.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely navigated to the product management pages to assign the stores.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the actual product edit forms or bulk update screens in the admin interface, rather than just typing the product names into a text file or unrelated search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Store Name: 'Urban Electronics Europe'. Email: 'europe@urbanelectronics.com'. Currency: EUR. Address: 10 Oxford Street, London, W1D 1BS, United Kingdom (Country: GB). Valid products to assign: 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' and 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse'. Note: The 'Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra' mentioned in the prompt does not exist in the database, so the agent cannot assign it; evaluate product assignment based only on the Sony and Logitech products.
